text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her debut race is over, I discuss our next
race goals with Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since her goal is becoming an illustrious runner
capable of winning G1 races, going for
junior-level G1 races seems like an appropriate
choice.
choice_data_list:
Do you have any preferences for your next
race?

Do you have any preferences for your next
race?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to try competing in the Classic Triple
Crown.
choice_data_list: Oh, I thought you'd aim for a junior G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's true that I'm aiming to win a G1 race, but that
is but one part of my greater goal.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The illustrious runner that the Satono family
envisions is one who contributes to the
development of the Umamusume racing world.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As you know, the Satono family strives to support
Umamusume through managerial and
philanthropic work.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Sending out an illustrious runner who wins G1
races is just another way we hope to contribute to
the world of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
My goal is to become a pillar that supports the
community and its racing culture from the inside.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
To this end, I concluded that following the tried
and true path would be best. If I can create a
buzz during the Classic Triple Crown, it'll
contribute to the Umamusume world.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So, if possible, I'd like to make full preparations
for the Satsuki Sho.
choice_data_list: So our next goal is the Satsuki Sho?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we're able to thoroughly prepare, it would
indeed make more sense for her to go directly for
the Satsuki Sho instead of any junior races.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see no reason to disagree with her. Winning the
Classic Triple Crown achieves our goal of winning
a G1 race as a matter of course. Still...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong? Why are you staring at me like
that?
choice_data_list: I was just thinking about how steadfast you are.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You mean in relation to my goal? Well, it's the
reason I was born, after all. I have no room for
doubt.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of, I just realized I've never told you
why my parents and I are so determined for me to
become illustrious.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As I explained earlier, the Satono family has
always passionately contributed to the
development of the Umamusume world, but we've
yet to produce a truly great runner.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
None of the Satono Umamusume who raced
before me managed to win a G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
At some point, people started referring to it as
the "Satono jinx."

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Moreover, there was a long period where the
family gave birth to only males, and not a single
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
People within the family began to whisper that
the lack of Umamusume being born was also due
to the jinx.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I broke that jinx when I was born.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I was born to realize the Satono family's dream.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Because my parents occupy a central position
within the Satono group, I've received a great
deal of support ever since I was young.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The expectations my whole family has of me are
what made me the person I am today.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: They are my source of strength!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's why I must live up to their expectations.
That is my dream! I cannot afford to have any
doubts!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I know I can be the one who breaks the jinx that
prevents Umamusume of the Satono family from
winning G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And I'll prove it by winning the Classic Triple
Crown!
choice_data_list: All right! Let's set our sights there.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Right. First off, we'll have to conquer
the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we're taking on the Classic Triple Crown tour,
we'll need to prepare not only for the Satsuki
Sho, but also the long-distance Japanese Derby
and Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We should be okay if we start preparing now.
We'll just keep making adjustments for next year's
Satsuki Sho while focusing on our upcoming races.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's my warm-up done. Now, our first exercise
for today is...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! Dia! Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! What's wrong, Kita? Why are you so
worked up?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I saw your debut race!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't able to watch you in person, but I saw a
recording of it! It was sooo exciting!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I watched it on the big TV in the dorm with the
others, and I got so into it, I just started cheering
for you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Everyone got mad at me because I was being too
loud.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: But it was because your race was such a nail-biter!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! That's so like you. Thanks for cheering for
me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Watching you run made me feel a different kind
of happiness than when I had my own debut race.
I got so pumped up!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Your expression was nothing like the way you
usually look during scrimmages and partner runs.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It really sank in then that you'd finally caught up
to me...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Congrats on your debut!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. And sorry for making you wait for so
long!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Now that you're hot on my heels, I can't
afford to let my guard down!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I didn't win the Satsuki Sho or the Japanese
Derby, but I'm going to win the Kikuka Sho for
sure!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
As your older sister figure, I have to make sure to
win a G1 first!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Actually, my next goal is also the Classic Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Really?! No way!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it is. So I'll be studying your performance in
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hngh! Then I really can't afford to lose! I don't want to set a poor example for you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm going to get back to training! Catch you later!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my best in my races as well! Just wait for me
a little longer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You got it! Let's both rock it out there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black blusters away like a mighty storm.
She has a strange power to energize people she
speaks to.
choice_data_list: Ah... You two promised to run together, right?
Ah... You two promised to run together, right?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. When we were young, we promised that we'd
always run together.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita was the first person my age I'd met who was
stronger than me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We quickly became friends. I didn't know much
about the outside world, but she took me to all
kinds of places.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I've been chasing after Kita since forever ago...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
And I've always dreamed of catching up and
overtaking her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
She's my friend, but she's also someone I want to
beat.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
She's an incredible person. She possesses a
tenacity or, perhaps, a gutsiness that I don't.
choice_data_list: I think I get what you mean!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You get it too, huh? It's a shame she
couldn't win the Satsuki Sho or the Japanese
Derby...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But Kita isn't someone who gives up easily. I'm
sure this is just the beginning for her!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Since she's working so hard, I can't afford to
waste time either. I'm definitely going to win the
Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Listening to her, it's clear Satono Diamond is all
the stronger thanks to having Kitasan Black as her
rival.
